new_classes.label_en: Tokaj wine, in containers > 2 l and ≤ 10 l (CN 2204 22 33)
new_classes.label_de: Tokajerwein, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l bis einschließlich 10 l (KN 2204 22 33)
new_classes.definition_en: Tokaj wine (PDO wine produced in the Tokaj wine region of Hungary/Slovakia), presented in containers holding more than 2 litres and not more than 10 litres, as defined by additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22 of the CN.

coverage_explanation: The main discriminating criteria are captured: (1) Tokaj wine — modelled via producedBy TokajWineProductionProcess which occurs_in TokajRegionSite (already in TBox); (2) container size > 2 l and ≤ 10 l — modelled via hasPart some MediumContainer2To10L (already in TBox). The sibling disjointness with TokajWineSmallContainer22042123 is expressed via a complement restriction. A minor gap exists: additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22 specifies detailed organoleptic and compositional criteria (e.g. total dry extract, alcoholic strength range, specific production rules) for Tokaj PDO wine, which cannot be fully modelled without the full text of that additional note. The TokajRegionSite and TokajWineProductionProcess classes are reused from the running TBox. Coverage is estimated at 0.85 because the full content of additional note 4(B)(b) (which would allow finer-grained sufficient conditions) is not available in the provided legal text.
